name: codex-skin-studio
description: Local-first Codex skin generator using the user's installed Codex CLI.

scripts.check: node --check bin/codex-skin.mjs && node --check src/codex-runtime.mjs && node --check src/reference-analysis.mjs && node --check src/skin-spec.mjs && node --check src/theme-assets.mjs && node --check src/theme-compiler.mjs && node --check src/pet-replacer.mjs && node --check src/bundle-validator.mjs && node --check src/store.mjs && node --check src/windows/cdp.mjs && node --check src/windows/injector-daemon.mjs && node --check src/windows/restart-helper.mjs && node --check plugin/codex-skin-studio/scripts/codex-skin.mjs
